services.whatsappIntro: Hello, I'm interested in the following service estimation:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Last updated: May 2026 · Applies to all Ngodingngedit.com services

sections.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy document governs the rights, obligations, and terms of use for coding, editing, design, and other digital services.
sections.note: By using our services, the client is deemed to have read, understood, and agreed to all applicable terms and conditions.

sections.title: 2. Definitions
items: "We" refers to the service provider.
"Client" refers to the individual, company, or party using the services.
"Project" refers to the work agreed upon between the client and the service provider.
"Revision" refers to minor changes that are still in line with the original brief.

sections.title: 3. Scope of Services
items: Website development.
Application development.
Source code editing.
Bug/error fixing.
Document editing.
Design editing.
Video or digital content editing.
Technical consultation.
Maintenance as agreed.
sections.callout: Services outside the initial agreement may incur additional charges.

sections.title: 4. Order Terms
items: The client must provide a clear and complete project brief.
The client is responsible for the completeness of project data and materials.
Work estimation begins after all data has been fully received.
Work begins after the down payment is received.
We reserve the right to decline certain projects without providing detailed reasons.

sections.title: 5. Pricing and Payment
items: Project pricing is determined based on difficulty level and scope of work.
Payment is made as agreed.
A minimum down payment of 50% is required before work begins.
Full payment must be made before the final file/full source code is delivered.
Late payment may result in work delays.
All payments made are non-refundable unless a specific agreement is in place.

sections.title: 6. Revisions
items: Revisions are provided according to the agreed quantity.
Revisions only apply to minor changes.
Major concept changes from the original brief are considered additional projects.
Additional revisions outside the package may incur additional charges.
Revision requests must be submitted within the specified time limit.

sections.title: 7. Project Timeline
items: Work time estimates are approximations.
Work time may change depending on project complexity.
Delays due to additional revisions or delays in data from the client are not our responsibility.
National holidays or force majeure conditions may affect the project timeline.
Provide project information clearly.
Provide data that is legal and does not violate the law.
Make timely payments.
Maintain good communication throughout the project.
Receive project progress updates.
Receive results as agreed.
Submit revisions according to the terms.
Decline certain projects.
Stop work if terms are violated.
Use project results as portfolio.
Complete the project as agreed.
Maintain client data confidentiality.
Provide professional service to the best of our ability.

sections.title: 10. Copyright and Ownership
items: Usage rights are granted after full payment is made.
Copyright of third-party assets follows their respective licenses.
We are not responsible for license violations committed by the client.
The client is prohibited from reselling or claiming certain sources that have special licenses.

sections.title: 11. Confidentiality
items: All client project data and files will be kept confidential.
We will not disclose project data without permission.
The client is also obligated to maintain the confidentiality of certain sources or files if agreed.

sections.title: 12. Warranty
items: Bug/error warranty is provided for a certain period after project completion.
Warranty only applies to errors from the initial work.
Warranty does not apply if:
subItems: Source is modified by another party.
Errors occur due to client misuse.

sections.title: 13. Maintenance and Support
items: Maintenance is only provided if included in the service package.
Support is provided during specified operational hours.
Requests outside the scope of support may incur additional charges.

sections.title: 14. Account and Access Usage
paragraphs: If the client provides account access:
items: Access is only used for project needs.
The client is advised to change passwords after the project is completed.
We are not responsible for leaks due to client negligence.

sections.title: 15. Prohibitions
paragraphs: We reserve the right to decline projects that:
items: Violate the law.
Contain malware or illegal hacking.
Are used for phishing or fraud.
Contain illegal pornography.
Violate copyright.
Contradict the policies of certain platforms.

sections.title: 16. Project Cancellation
items: If the project is cancelled by the client during execution, the down payment is forfeited.
If the project is more than 50% complete, the payments already made cannot be refunded.
If cancellation is made by us, a refund is made proportional to the unfinished portion of work.

sections.title: 17. Force Majeure
paragraphs: We are not responsible for delays or service failures due to:
items: Natural disasters.
Internet disruptions.
Power outages.
Server failures.
Government policies.
Other conditions beyond our control.

sections.title: 18. Limitation of Liability
items: Indirect business losses.
Data loss due to third parties.
Misuse of source code by the client.
Damage due to modifications by other parties.
Suspension of third-party accounts/platforms.

sections.title: 19. Changes to Terms
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy may be updated at any time without prior notice. The latest version will serve as the applicable reference.

sections.title: 20. Consent
paragraphs: By making a payment or using our services, the client is deemed to have agreed to all applicable Privacy Policies.

pd.description: A revolutionary EdTech platform providing a modern learning ecosystem connecting expert mentors with millions of students through interactive video classes, advanced adaptive quizzes, and real-time analytics dashboards.
pd.overviewDesc: The need for an engaging digital learning platform drove us to build EduLearn. Our primary focus was delivering a highly responsive user interface, ultra-fast page load times, and dynamic quiz data structures so each student gets a personalized learning experience.
pd.feature1Desc: Students can track class learning progress, quiz scores, and weekly study time in real-time through adaptive visual charts.
pd.feature2Desc: Adaptive quizzes with dynamic data structures that automatically adjust question difficulty based on student understanding.
pd.feature3Desc: Custom video player with adaptive streaming quality (HLS) without lag, integrated with automatic timestamp notes for easy material review.
pd.gallerySubtitle: Click a thumbnail below to preview different pages live.
pd.processSubtitle: The systematic steps we took to launch EduLearn Platform with the highest quality.
pd.step1Desc: Studying online learning barriers and crafting user personas.
pd.step2Desc: Creating visual wireframes, soft-blue color schemes, and navigation prototype flows.
pd.step3Desc: Coding with Vue.js and TailwindCSS using a modular reusable structure.
pd.step4Desc: Setting up PostgreSQL database and securely routing Node.js REST APIs.
pd.step5Desc: Testing page load performance, debugging API failures, then deploying to a VPS server.
pd.challengesSubtitle: How our team overcame difficult technical problems.
pd.challenge1Desc: In areas with unstable internet connections, video class content experienced severe buffering.
pd.solution1Desc: Implemented an adaptive HTTP Live Streaming (HLS) system to split videos into small fragments and automatically adjust the bitrate.
pd.challenge2Desc: Students experienced visual delays when quiz routes changed and quiz question state was slow to respond to click actions.
pd.solution2Desc: Integrated Pinia for local state data caching, pre-fetching the next question in the background.
pd.resultsSubtitle: Real achievement numbers for EduLearn Platform after the first release.
pd.quoteText: NgodingNgedit successfully translated our complex idea into an incredibly intuitive, fast EdTech platform loved by thousands of our students! Their development support was outstanding from initial research to launch.
pd.ctaTitle: Interested in Building Your Dream Platform?
pd.ctaSubtitle: Discuss your digital project needs with our top developer team.
pd.mockupContinue: Continue your Vue.js Intermediate learning today.
pd.mockupQuestion: How do you create dynamic routes in Vue Router?
pd.mockupOpt1: A. Using :id syntax on the route path
